title: Dynamic Labels in a column based on another column value
excerpt:

posts.author: cgodbou (Charles Godbout)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like a feature allowing dynamic option in a status column based of user choice in another column.
i.e. if I change the value of column 1 to “x”, options in column 2 will be “A, b, and c”. And if I change value in column 1 to “y”, then options in column 2 will become “d, e and f”.
Is it something that can be developped?

Thanks!

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @cgodbou I have no idea if this is mondays roadmap, but I can suggest you checkout a marketplace app named Workflow.

It allows you to show dynamic labels based on your choice in that same status column.

posts.author: cgodbou (Charles Godbout)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Noam,

thanks for your answer ! Much appreciated !

The use of third-party applications is not an option in my situation. I am not the administrator of my account.

I’d like to know if it’s possible to check whether the roadmap mentions such a feature.

And if not, is it possible to submit the request?

Thanks
